Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 10 

BENE_ZIP_CD 

LABEL: ZIP Code for Beneficiary Home or Mailing Address — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The zip code for the beneficiary home address; most recent in the calendar and the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: BENE_ZIP_CD 

LONG NAME: BENE_ZIP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 9 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
